methodology_sections: 1.1 Asset Inventory - Financial assets, state assets, privilege assets, reputation assets
1.3 System Architecture Mapping - Contract hierarchies, dependencies, upgrade patterns, access control
2.1 Entry Point Enumeration - Public/external functions, callbacks, parameter analysis

financial_assets: ERC20 assetToken balances held by AgentFactoryV2/V3/V4 during application lifecycle (applicationThreshold deposits) and during initial LP creation
ERC20 pairToken balances held by AgentToken during initial liquidity and/or during tax swaps (pairToken = assetToken in factory-created tokens)
UniswapV2 LP tokens minted to AgentToken (initially) then transferred to lpOwner; in factories/migrator lpOwner is factory/migrator then staked into veToken
ERC20 stakingAsset for veToken (typically LP token) held by AgentVeToken as backing for non-transferable veToken shares
ERC721 AgentNftV2 tokens (Virtual IDs) representing agent identities/metadata ownership in vault
Tax token accrual in AgentToken contract balance (address(this)) and projectTaxPendingSwap accounting
ETH held by AgentToken via receive() (unexpected but possible), withdrawable by owner/factory via withdrawETH
Custom external ERC20 tokens deposited into AgentFactoryV4 via initFromToken(initialLP) and held until execute/withdraw
state_assets: AgentToken: _balances, _allowances, _totalSupply, _name/_symbol, fundedDate, botProtectionDurationInSeconds, projectBuyTaxBasisPoints, projectSellTaxBasisPoints, swapThresholdBasisPoints, projectTaxRecipient, projectTaxPendingSwap, vault, pairToken, uniswapV2Pair, _autoSwapInProgress, _tokenHasTax, _validCallerCodeHashes set, _liquidityPools set, _factory, _uniswapRouter

AgentFactoryV2/V3/V4: _applications mapping (Application structs incl. status, withdrawableAmount, proposer, cores, dao params, tba params), _nextId, implementation addresses (tokenImplementation/daoImplementation/veTokenImplementation), config (applicationThreshold, maturityDuration, assetToken, nft, tbaRegistry, defaultDelegatee), allTokens/allDAOs/allTradingTokens arrays, _tokenSupplyParams/_tokenTaxParams bytes, _uniswapRouter, _tokenAdmin, role memberships (AccessControl), pause state, reentrancy lock flag

AgentNftV2: _nextVirtualId, virtualInfos mapping (dao, token, founder, tba, coreTypes), virtualLPs mapping (pool, veToken), _stakingTokenToVirtualId mapping, validator registries state (validators list/map, base scores), coreTypes registry state, blacklist mapping, contribution/service NFT addresses, eloCalculator address, AccessControl role memberships

AgentVeToken: founder, assetToken (staked token), agentNft address, matureAt, canStake, initialLock, ERC20Votes checkpoints (voting power), custom _balanceCheckpoints for past balances, delegatee checkpoints (via ERC20Votes wrapper), reentrancy lock flag
AgentMigrator: init/config params (_tokenSupplyParams/_tokenTaxParams/_tokenAdmin/_assetToken/_uniswapRouter/initialAmount/maturityDuration/implementations), migratedAgents mapping, pause state
privilege_assets: AgentToken owner (Ownable2StepUpgradeable): can manage tax params, liquidity pools, withdraw ETH/ERC20, add initial liquidity (also factory)
AgentToken factory authority (_factory set at initialize time): same as owner via onlyOwnerOrFactory; effectively privileged operator for deployed tokens
AgentFactoryV2/V3/V4 DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE: full control over system parameters (implementations, router, tokenAdmin, thresholds, pause/unpause, token param templates, defaultDelegatee)
AgentFactoryV2/V3/V4 WITHDRAW_ROLE: can withdraw/execute applications on behalf of proposer
AgentFactoryV3 BONDING_ROLE: can create and execute bonding-curve-based applications (initFromBondingCurve/executeBondingCurveApplication)
AgentNftV2 DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE: can set contribution/service NFT addresses, add core types; implicitly can grant/revoke roles via inherited AccessControlUpgradeable functions
AgentNftV2 MINTER_ROLE: can mint new Agent NFTs and setTBA (one-time) on virtuals
AgentNftV2 ADMIN_ROLE: can set blacklist, migrate score functions, set ELO calculator, migrateVirtual (overwrite dao/token/pool/veToken mappings)
AgentNftV2 VALIDATOR_ADMIN_ROLE: can manage validators for all personas (via underlying ValidatorRegistry usage; role exists even if no explicit gating on addValidator)
AgentVeToken founder: can toggle canStake; can withdraw subject to matureAt/initialLock rule
AgentVeToken ADMIN_ROLE holders on agentNft (checked via IAccessControl(agentNft).hasRole): can setMatureAt for veToken
AgentMigrator owner: can set init params, token params, implementations, pause/unpause, and reset migratedAgents
reputation_assets: Governance voting power represented by AgentVeToken (ERC20Votes) balances and delegatee checkpoints
Validator reputation/score in AgentDAO (queried by AgentNftV2 via scoreOf/getPastScore) and composed validatorScore in ValidatorRegistry
Agent identity/metadata integrity: AgentNftV2 virtualInfos (dao/token/tba/founder/coreTypes) and blacklisting status
DAO legitimacy/trust: mapping from virtualId to DAO address (can be migrated/changed), affecting who can update coreTypes/tokenURI

system_architecture.inheritance_hierarchy: AgentToken: ContextUpgradeable + Ownable2StepUpgradeable (upgradeable base) implements IAgentToken/IERC20; AgentFactoryV2/V3/V4: Initializable + AccessControl + PausableUpgradeable; AgentNftV2: Initializable + ERC721Upgradeable + ERC721URIStorageUpgradeable + AccessControlUpgradeable + CoreRegistry + ValidatorRegistry; AgentVeToken: ERC20Upgradeable + ERC20Votes (wrapper over ERC20VotesUpgradeable); AgentMigrator: Ownable + Pausable (non-upgradeable). Libraries: AddressCheckpoints used by ERC20Votes wrapper; OZ Checkpoints used by AgentVeToken for balance checkpoints.
external_dependencies: OpenZeppelin upgradeable: Initializable, ContextUpgradeable, Ownable2StepUpgradeable, PausableUpgradeable, ERC20Upgradeable, ERC20VotesUpgradeable, ERC721Upgradeable, ERC721URIStorageUpgradeable, AccessControlUpgradeable
OpenZeppelin non-upgradeable: AccessControl, Ownable, Pausable, Clones, SafeERC20, EnumerableSet, IERC20/IERC20Metadata, IGovernor/IVotes, IERC721Enumerable, Math/SafeCast
system_architecture.upgrade_patterns: AgentToken, AgentFactoryV2/V3/V4, AgentNftV2, AgentVeToken are written as upgradeable implementations (Initializable + constructor disables initializers) and are intended to be deployed behind proxies or cloned; factories and migrator use EIP-1167 minimal proxy clones (Clones.clone) for token/dao/veToken deployments. No Diamond pattern detected. No explicit UUPS/Transparent proxy admin functions are present in the provided code (proxy layer not included).
system_architecture.access_control_structure: Role-based control via AccessControl (factories) and AccessControlUpgradeable (AgentNftV2). DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE is granted at initialize to deployer-provided admin. Additional roles: WITHDRAW_ROLE (factories), BONDING_ROLE (FactoryV3), MINTER_ROLE/ADMIN_ROLE/VALIDATOR_ADMIN_ROLE (AgentNftV2). AgentToken uses Ownable2StepUpgradeable ownership plus a factory address set at token initialize; privileged actions gated by onlyOwnerOrFactory. AgentMigrator uses Ownable. Pausable is exposed on factories and migrator (public/external).

external_calls: potential ERC20(pairToken).balanceOf (during initial liquidity only in addInitialLiquidity; not here)
low-level call with value to msg.sender

state_changes: LP approvals and staking side effects
allTokens/allDAOs (and possibly none for allTradingTokens if custom token)
validator registry (_validatorsMap/_validators/_baseValidatorScore) if not already validator
LP approvals and staking side effects

external_calls: indirect external calls via stored function pointers (AgentNftV2 routes to AgentDAO.scoreOf)
indirect external calls via stored function pointers (AgentNftV2 routes to AgentDAO.getPastScore)
validatorScore in a loop; may trigger indirect AgentDAO calls

upgradeability_surface.notes: Upgradeable implementation intended for proxies/clones; uses OZ upgradeable bases. No proxy contract provided; storage collision depends on deployment pattern outside this code.
Upgradeable factory implementation; also deploys EIP-1167 clones. No explicit proxy admin/upgrade entry points included.
Upgradeable factory implementation; adds BONDING_ROLE entry points.
Upgradeable factory implementation; adds custom-token application mappings.
Upgradeable ERC721 + AccessControlUpgradeable + custom registries; relies on proper proxy initialization.
Upgradeable ERC20Votes-based token. Non-transferable by reverting transfer/approve, but still exposes ERC20Votes hooks and checkpoints.
Non-upgradeable Ownable/Pausable helper. Not intended for proxy.
